name: GaugeFlow A11-S/Q automorphism-quotient stoichiometric assignment v1
objective: Prepare, but do not launch, the stochastic balanced-assignment and automorphism-quotient successor required by A11.0's mixed unlabeled-site orbits.

method_contract.replace: Independent/count-reveal site classification is replaced by site-to-species-slot assignment under exact row/column constraints.
method_contract.training_relaxation: Entropic Sinkhorn on site-slot scores with fixed temperature and iterations.
method_contract.sampling: Exchangeable Gumbel noise plus a balanced assignment; same-species slots are interchangeable.
method_contract.supervision: Automorphism-quotient likelihood over unique target labelings induced only by unlabeled periodic geometry.
forbidden_alignment_inputs: target species to choose a geometry mapping
